name: Dehumidifier Controller
description: Controls a dehumidifier based on humidity, temperature, and operating constraints

minHumidity.label: Minimum humidity
minHumidity.description: Lower humidity limit for target calculation

maxHumidity.label: Maximum humidity
maxHumidity.description: Upper humidity limit for target calculation

baseTarget.label: Base target
baseTarget.description: Base target humidity before temperature and mode offsets

minOnTime.label: Minimum on time
minOnTime.description: Minimum runtime before switching off is allowed

minOffTime.label: Minimum off time
minOffTime.description: Minimum pause before switching on is allowed again

windowOpen.name: Window open
windowOpen.description: Window open state used to inhibit dehumidifier operation

nightMode.name: Night mode
nightMode.description: Night mode input for target humidity adjustment

absenceMode.name: Absence mode
absenceMode.description: Absence mode input for target humidity adjustment

control.name: Control
control.description: Dehumidifier control signal (true = on, false = off)
